Image originally from cultist simulator and in [[Catgirl Simulator]] used for one of the [[Nine aspects]] [[Category:Nine aspects]]
[[sn:Moth.svg]][[Category:Larping]]
[[sn:File:Moth.svg]][[sn:File:Moth.svg]][[sn:File:Moth.svg]][[Category:Gnosis]]
[[sn:File:Moth.svg]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
